name: Chilled Pappa Al Pomodoro with Crab Meat Crostini
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups day old bread, torn up
8 ounces fresh crab meat, Dungeness or Maryland
2 tablespoons extra virgin olive oil, plus 1/4 cup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor, blend the tomatoes until liquid.
2. Add day old bread, basil, thyme, and season with salt and pepper.
3. If too thick, thin with water.
4. Allow to sit in a cool place.
5. In a medium mixing bowl, toss crab meat with 2 tablespoons extra virgin olive oil, lemon juice and zest, red pepper flakes, and scallions. Season lightly with salt.
6. Divide the cool tomato soup among 4 bowls.
7. Place one slice of baguette in the center of each bowl.
8. Float 2 ounces of crab meat mixture on top of each baguette slice and serve.
